qa_pairs.question: How can I add several roles to my account?
qa_pairs.answer: To add several roles, go to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role and click on “disable old roles” on that page.

qa_pairs.question: If I submit multiple applications, can I set more than one as my primary role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, you can submit several applications, but you can only set one of them as your primary role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I'm trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.
